result.title: Insane Open Source AI Model Just Dropped
result.description:
Why is NO ONE talking about this?!

Meet GLM-5.1, the new open-source beast of a model from Z.ai that’s officially outperforming industry giants like GPT-5.4 and Opus 4.6 on complex coding tasks.

AND it’s open-weight under the MIT license, so you can download it, fine-tune it, and run it locally. 

To stay up-to-date on all the AI news, check out my weekly videos like the one linked here.

#AI #AInews #TechNews #opensource

result.title: They Nerfed This Viral AI Model
result.description:
🚨 The wait is OVER. 

The AI video model everyone’s been raving about for months is finally available in the US.

Seedance 2.0 has officially landed, and you can find it right now inside the Runway and CapCut apps. 

While you can't generate celebrity deepfakes or trademarked IP anymore, the quality is still insane. It’s incredibly fast and handles complex, multi-scene prompts like a pro.

With Sora out of the picture now, this is easily the most powerful video tool you can get your hands on today. 

Have you tried it yet? Let me know in the comments!

#Seedance #genAI #AI #Ainews #AIvideo

result.title: Claude Mythos Explained
result.description:
This is the biggest AI story this week BY FAR.

Anthropic just revealed "Claude Mythos", a model so powerful and so good at hacking that they’ve decided it’s too dangerous to release to the public.

Because of the unprecedented potential of this model, Anthropic is keeping it under lock and key, only granting access to a few elite security teams via "Project Glasswing."

Is this the end of software security as we know it, or the beginning of a new AI-driven defense era? 

To stay up-to-date with all the AI news, check out my weekly AI news videos on my channel! 

#Mythos #Anthropic #AI #CyberSecurity #AInews
